infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Stow-a-way uses the camera so you can photograph the contents of a box and add it to your inventory.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Stow-a-way needs access to your photo library so you can attach existing photos to a box.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Stow-a-way can save box photos back to your photo library.

plugins.photosPermission: Stow-a-way needs access to your photo library so you can attach existing photos to a box.
plugins.cameraPermission: Stow-a-way uses the camera so you can photograph the contents of a box and add it to your inventory.
